seo.pageTitle: Nami, Morning Calm & Petite France Private Tour | AtoC Korea
seo.metaDescription: Private 9–10-hour Seoul day trip to Gapyeong's three icons: Nami Island, the Garden of Morning Calm, and Petite France. Free Seoul hotel pickup, EN guide.
seo.title: 首爾私人包車：南怡島＋晨靜苑＋小法國村一日遊 | AtoC Korea
seo.description: 首爾私人包車北郊一日遊：南怡島（渡輪橫渡＋韓劇《冬季戀歌》取景地）→晨靜苑季節主題庭園→小法國村（《跑男》《愛的迫降》取景地）。含飯店接送，無陌生旅客。

catalog_card.title: 首爾私人行程：南怡島、晨靜苑＆小法國村
catalog_card.subtitle: Three of Korea's most photographed day-trip landmarks, in one private vehicle without the bus-tour pace.
catalog_card.shortCardDescription: A private day trip from Seoul covering Nami Island's tree-lined ferry experience, the Garden of Morning Calm's themed garden walks, and the colorful Le Petit Prince village of Petite France. Hotel pickup, private vehicle, and a relaxed pace make this the comfort-led version of a classic Gapyeong loop.

price.priceNote: 費用尚未確認。私人包車定價視車輛大小而異。確認後，AtoC Korea直售價格享9折優惠。

hero.tagline: 從南怡島渡輪橫渡，到晨靜苑的主題庭園，再到小法國村的歐陸建築——首爾北郊最上鏡的私人三景

itineraryStops.name: Nami Island (Namiseom)
itineraryStops.description: 南怡島以5分鐘渡輪從加平碼頭出發，登上北漢江中一座形似半月的河中小島。面積約**46萬平方公尺、周長約5公里**，以朝鮮時代軍事將領**南怡（1441至1468年）**命名。2002年，南怡島因成為KBS劇集**《冬季戀歌》**（裴勇俊、崔志友主演）的拍攝地而享譽全球——成為2000年代初韓流浪潮的催化劑——每年至今仍吸引約**330萬人次**（其中130萬名外籍旅客）。自**2006年3月1日**起，島嶼以「**南怡共和國**」的名義進行自我品牌建設，設有專屬旗幟、貨幣（남이통보硬幣）、護照和郵政服務（旅遊行銷概念）。標誌性的**水杉大道**（《冬季戀歌》經典雪中小徑）、**銀杏戀人道**、**韓國紅松道**，以及用燒酒瓶製成的再生玻璃紅杉橋，都可在輕鬆的半日遊中步行游覽。
highlights: 半月形河中小島，約46萬平方公尺 / 周長5公里；以將領南怡（1441至1468年）命名
標誌性水杉大道 — 《冬季戀歌》（2002年）經典拍攝地
自2006年起自稱「南怡共和國」 — 設有旗幟、貨幣、護照（旅遊概念）
從加平碼頭搭乘5分鐘渡輪（每10至20分鐘一班）
島上野生動物：孔雀（含罕見白化孔雀）、鴕鳥、野兔、松鼠
**1944年清平水壩建成**使南怡成為永久島嶼
**2006年3月1日宣布成立南怡共和國** — 韓國第一個微型旅遊共和國概念
**UNICEF兒童友善公園2010年認定** + 每年600多場表演/展覽/節慶
**入場費**：正常渡輪₩19,000來回；36個月以下嬰兒免費
timeUsed: Ferry crossing from Gapyeong Wharf (5-10 minutes including queue)
Free walking time along the Metasequoia / Ginkgo / Korean Pine avenues — full island circuit ~5 km
Optional bicycle rental (single 7,000 / tandem 14,000 KRW per hour) or electric blue train (3,000 KRW one-way to UNICEF Hall)
On-island lunch (Sonata Cafe, hotteok, sweet potato latte, tteok-galbi)
Return ferry to the mainland
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **南怡島排在最前**，利用最強的早晨光線進行林蔭步道攝影，同時避開下午最重的渡船排隊人潮。在全日體力最充沛時在島上停留，也讓後續的晨靜樹木園和小法國村在更輕鬆的節奏下進行。私人包車跳過了加平接駁巴士（每30至60分鐘一班）的等候時間，為南怡島多爭取了1至2小時的有效遊覽時間。

visitBasics.hours: Island 08:00-21:00 (last ferry varies); on-island shops mostly close by 18:00
visitBasics.admission: Naminara Republic VISA Fee (round-trip ferry included): Regular 19,000 KRW / Discount 16,000 KRW (seniors 70+, middle-high school students) / Special 13,000 KRW (children 36 months-elementary + early bird 08:00 ferry); 10% group discount 20+ persons
visitBasics.walking: Easy — flat tree-lined paths; full perimeter walk ~5 km. Bicycle / e-buggy rental available for low-mobility visitors.

convenience.restroom: Multiple on island and at Gapyeong Wharf
convenience.parking: Gapyeong Wharf 6,000 KRW small car / 10,000 KRW large vehicle (extra 1,000 KRW per hour after 12 hours)

smartNotes.photo: Metasequoia avenue is the world-famous Winter Sonata shot — best in autumn (golden, late October-early November) or winter (snow). Riverside Lover's Ginkgo Tree Lane on the south side is quieter and equally photogenic. Albino peacock occasionally appears near Lover's Lane.
smartNotes.facilities: On-island restaurants serve Korean comfort food (hotteok, sweet potato latte, tteok-galbi). Sonata Cafe in a traditional hanok is the signature stop. Foreign-card-friendly ticket counter at Gapyeong Wharf — ticket machines do not accept foreign cards, ask at the counter.
smartNotes.tip: Best seasons: spring (April-May cherry blossoms), autumn (October golden ginkgo + red maple), winter (December-February snow-quiet paths reminiscent of Winter Sonata). Avoid the Sunday late-afternoon ferry queue — leave the island before 16:00. Zipwire (940 m, ~80 km/h, 55,000-58,000 KRW including admission) saves 15-20 min vs ferry queue at peak.

sources: Korea Tourism Organization (VisitKorea — Nami Island official listing + visa fee schedule)
Naminara Republic Official Site (namisum-en.imweb.me — own corpus on cultural-independence brand)
UNICEF Korea (Nami Island 2010 Child Friendly Park designation + International Children's Book Festival)
KBS / Korea Times (Winter Sonata 2002 production retrospectives + Japanese tourism boom coverage)
Wikipedia (Namiseom — open corpus on General Nami history + Cheongpyeong Dam 1944 origin)

itineraryStops.name: The Garden of Morning Calm
itineraryStops.description: 距南怡島南方約30分鐘車程，**晨靜樹木園**是韓國最具代表性的私人樹木園——佔地約**33萬平方公尺**，種植約**5,000種植物**。樹木園由三育大學的韓相勁構思於**1992年**，**1996年對外開放**，名稱取自韓國「朝鮮」（晨靜之國）的稱號。韓相勁及其妻子親手設計並開闢整座花園，甚至在早期財務困難時賣掉自家房子。園內設有**20個主題子花園**——包括形似韓國半島的「凹陷花園」、「月光花園」、「盆景花園」和「伊甸花園」。冬季燈光節每年12月初至3月中旬裝設逾**20萬個LED燈泡**（2025至2026年為12月5日至2026年3月15日）。**CNN評選為韓國前50大觀光景點**。
highlights: 韓國最具代表性的私人樹木園 — 33萬平方公尺，種植約5,000種植物
三育大學韓相勁教授1996年開放（1992年構思）
冬季燈光節：2025年12月5日至2026年3月15日，20萬+個LED
20個主題子花園 — 形似韓國半島的「凹陷花園」等
韓劇《雲畫的月光》等拍攝地
**1992年構思 / 1994年購地 / 1996年5月11日開放**：創辦人夫婦親手設計，甚至賣掉自家房子
**CNN評選為韓國前50大觀光景點**
**燈光節20萬+個環保LED燈泡**（12月至3月）
**天年香（中國刺柏）**是晨靜樹木園的官方象徵植物
timeUsed: Garden entry and brief orientation by the driver-guide
Free walking time across the 20 themed sub-gardens (suggested 1.5-2 hours)
Optional cafe stop at Morning Spring Bakery or the on-site Food Garden (Korean comfort food)
Winter visits: stay through 17:00 illumination start to see the daytime garden + lighting festival
Optional Sunken Garden (Korean Peninsula shape) extended photo time — CNN Top-50-cited landmark feature (~15 min)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **晨靜樹木園排在路線中段**，在南怡島的活躍步行巡迴和小法國村的緊湊村落收尾之間，提供全日最平靜的視覺章節。12月至3月，花園在黑暗中舉辦韓國最大的花園燈光節，日落後延長開放至21:00——若出發日期落在此窗口，可安排在此多停留並加入夜間換場。

visitBasics.hours: Spring-Autumn 08:30-19:00 (last entry 18:00); Winter Lighting Festival Sun-Fri 11:00-21:00, Sat 11:00-23:00
visitBasics.admission: Adult 11,000 KRW / Senior 65+ 9,000 KRW / Youth 13-18 8,500 KRW / Child 3-12 7,500 KRW (2,000 KRW discount on adjacent zoo for ticket holders)
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — extensive paths over rolling terrain through 20 themed sub-gardens; mostly stroller-accessible main loop

convenience.parking: Large free parking; coin lockers 1,500-2,000 KRW (500-KRW coins only)

smartNotes.photo: Spring (cherry blossoms April), summer (lush greens), autumn (foliage October-early November), and winter (lighting festival post-sunset) all photograph differently. The light tunnels at dusk during festival period are the iconic shot.
smartNotes.facilities: Food Garden serves Korean comfort food (soybean-paste stew, vegetable bibimbap, snow cheese tteokbokki). Good Morning Coffee in a hanok roasting house is the signature cafe. Restaurants close at 20:00.
smartNotes.tip: For the lighting festival (Dec 5 - Mar 15), arrive ~16:00 to see the daytime garden first, then stay through illumination (~17:00 onward). Heavy snow February gives the most magical Frozen-movie scene.

_poi_meta.note: POI verified in KB v1.10 (Batch 7) and reused here unchanged.
sources: Garden of Morning Calm Official Site (morningcalm.co.kr — own corpus on founder + 1996 opening + 20 sub-gardens)
Korea Tourism Organization (VisitKorea — Lighting Festival listing + lighting-fest schedule)
Gyeonggi Cultural Foundation (ggc.ggcf.kr — official cultural promotion entry on Sunken Garden + 200,000 LEDs)
Sahmyook University Department of Horticulture (Prof. Han Sang-kyung honorary professor profile + garden origin)
Wikipedia (Garden of Morning Calm — corpus on Tagore-derived name + 5,000 species + 330,000 m² total)

itineraryStops.name: Petite France
itineraryStops.description: 這是當日緊湊的最後一站，小法國村是一個依山而建的法式文化主題村，俯瞰著清平湖，距南怡島約25分鐘車程。由創辦人한홍섭於**2008年7月開幕**，16棟建築以**「花卉、星星與小王子」**（聖-埃克蘇佩里1943年著作）為主題，設有聖-埃克蘇佩里紀念館、奧格爾館（藏有200年歷史古董音樂盒）、法式住宅展覽館、傀儡劇場，以及高盧雄雞雕塑和繪畫畫廊。韓劇拍攝記錄包括**《貝多芬病毒》（2008年）、《個人趣向》（2010年）、《秘密花園》（2010年）、《來自星星的你》（2013至2014年）、《女王陛下的食物》（2025年）**。小法國村是**韓國唯一獲得聖-埃克蘇佩里基金會授權的機構**，場內所有小王子圖案均獲法國正式授權。
highlights: 2008年7月開幕；16棟法式建築，以《小王子》主題打造
奧格爾館：200年歷史古董音樂盒；傀儡劇場每日表演
緊鄰皮諾曹與達文西義大利村 — 套票₩19,500/成人
入選2026年韓法建交140週年紀念計劃
**韓國唯一獲聖-埃克蘇佩里基金會國際授權** — 所有小王子圖案均獲法國正式授權
**16棟建築含一棟19世紀法式農舍**，200年以上木材榫卯工藝不使用鐵釘
**2025年《女王陛下的食物》拍攝地**（任允娥飾演角色房間）
timeUsed: Entry and quick orientation
Walk through the colorful streets and 16 building exhibits + photo points (~45 min)
Optional Marionette show or Orgel demonstration if scheduled
Light refreshment at on-site snack stalls or coffee shop
Optional Pinocchio & Da Vinci Italian Village extension visit (~45 min, combo ticket ₩19,500 adult)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **小法國村排在最後**，在南怡島更廣闊的步行巡迴和晨靜樹木園的視覺豐富感之後，以輕盈、拍照友善的方式作為全日收尾。其緊湊的規模（通常遊覽1.5至2小時）天然契合日落前的最後一站時段，而K-drama取景地的身份（《來自星星的你》）讓此站成為有意尋找特定拍攝場景的訪客的明確目的地。

visitBasics.hours: 09:00-18:00 (last entry 17:00); some Mondays closed in off-season; night-festival hours announced separately
visitBasics.admission: Adult 12,000 KRW / Teen 8,500 / Child 7,500 KRW (combined Petite France + Italian Village 19,500 KRW adult)
visitBasics.walking: Easy — small flat-to-gentle-slope village (1-1.5 hours to explore)

smartNotes.photo: Pastel-colored timber-framed houses against the green mountain backdrop are the signature shots. The viewing deck at the top of the hill offers the best wide composition. K-drama scene-spotting is a guided activity for fans (Saint-Exupéry building = My Love from the Star pivotal scenes).
smartNotes.facilities: Snack stalls only — waffles, dumplings, fish-cake soup, coffee. Most visitors eat at adjacent Italian Village or in nearby Cheongpyeong town instead.
smartNotes.tip: Best paired with Nami Island and/or Garden of Morning Calm via the Gapyeong City Tour Bus for self-guided trips. Late-afternoon arrival lets you see daytime + early-evening illumination. Visitors expecting a large attraction often note the modest scale (1.5-2 hours typical) — manage expectations.

_poi_meta.note: POI verified in KB v1.10 (Batch 7) and reused here unchanged.
sources: Petite France Official Site (en.pfcamp.com — own corpus on founder + 16-building layout + Goseong Youth Training Center)
Korea Tourism Organization (VisitKorea — Petite France listing + 2025 'Bon Appétit, Your Majesty' filming-location verification)
Saint-Exupéry Foundation France (international license agreement — Le Petit Prince motif authorization)
Gapyeong County Tourism Office (gapyeong.go.kr — official local-government attractions listing)
Wikipedia (Petite France theme park — corpus on July 2008 opening + Le Petit Prince theme + organizational structure)

routeShapeIntro.title: 行程動線總覽
routeShapeIntro.subtitle: Pickup at your Seoul downtown hotel, then a single direction Gapyeong loop: Nami Island first for forest morning light, lunch in Gapyeong, then Morning Calm and Petite France in the afternoon. Return to Seoul around 19:00 to 19:30.

bestFor: 渴望浪漫K-drama全日行程的情侶及蜜月旅客
初次到韓國、希望在首爾以外好好體驗一個日行程的旅客
希望享有私家車而非巴士行程節奏的旅客

routeLogicSections.title: 為何加平環線選擇私人包車格式

items.label: 省去接駁巴士等候
items.detail: 標準加平接駁巴士每30至60分鐘一班。私人交通省去等候，每天多回1至2小時有效遊覽時間。

items.label: 時間安排更靈活
items.detail: 您可以在最喜愛的景點多停留——通常是南怡島或晨靜樹木園——而無需配合固定的團體返回時間。

items.label: 攜帶父母和孩子更輕鬆
items.detail: 門到門接送省去清晨地鐵換乘和深夜接駁車的壓力，讓多代同遊的路線輕鬆許多。

items.label: 南怡島步行量最多
items.detail: 島嶼面積大，最美麗的落羽松和銀杏步道距渡船碼頭單程需15至20分鐘；若步行是顧慮，可選自行車租借。

items.label: 晨靜樹木園以輕鬆為主，可選上坡
items.detail: 大多數步道平緩，但上坡至觀景台有短程爬坡值得一走。

items.label: 小法國村是最輕鬆的一站
items.detail: 村落面積小，主要為緊湊格局，有緩坡石階，但無任何挑戰性步行。

items.label: 秋季是最強的拍攝季節
items.detail: 10月下旬至11月中旬南怡島落羽松和銀杏步道金黃火紅，人潮達到高峰；請提早預訂。

items.label: 冬季有燈光節
items.detail: 12月初至3月中旬，晨靜樹木園舉辦韓國最大的花園燈光節——值得留到日落後觀賞。

items.label: 春夏氣氛較為平靜
items.detail: 4至5月賞櫻和杜鵑花；7至8月植被翠綠旺盛，但潮濕度也較高。

lessIdealFor: 獨遊預算旅客（私人定價按車計，非按人計）
希望以高能量或運動為主的旅客
不喜歡在不平整花園步道上行走的旅客
需要全程室內雨天備案的旅客

practicalAccordionItems.title: 接送與下車地點
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 首爾市中心飯店免費接送；大廳提早10分鐘
content: 首爾市中心地區飯店提供免費接送（明洞、弘大、東大門、仁寺洞、梨泰院、江南）。
首爾市中心以外的住宿可能需要小額附加接送費。
請在約定出發時間前10分鐘在飯店大廳等候。
接送通常在08:30至09:30之間開始。
返回時於首爾飯店下車，預計19:00至19:30（若停留冬季燈光節則更晚）。
行程詳情通常在出發前2至3天確認。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 步行強度與地形
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 中等難度，南怡島步行量最多
content: 南怡島：輕鬆非鋪設步道，但島嶼比看起來大——從渡船碼頭到著名落羽松步道單程需15至20分鐘。
晨靜樹木園：輕鬆至中等，以緩坡為主，有可選的上坡觀景台步道。
小法國村：輕鬆步行，有緩坡及石階，無需求高。
建議穿著舒適步行鞋；路線並非完全不能使用嬰兒車，但也並非全程無障礙。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 天候政策
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 大多數景點在小雨或降雪中仍可運作
content: 南怡島在雨天和雪天照常運作；渡船在影響安全的情況下才停航。
晨靜樹木園以室外為主；小雨可以應付，大雨降低觀賞體驗。
小法國村設有室內展示廳，可作為雨天遮蔽場所。
司機兼導遊可在當天根據天氣調整各站節奏。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 門票與當日費用
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 所有入場費及餐費現場支付；刷卡廣泛通用
content: 南怡島入場費含來回渡船：成人₩19,000。
晨靜樹木園入場費：成人₩11,000。
小法國村入場費：成人₩12,000。
餐費（午餐及點心）現場支付；南怡島附近닭갈비（辣炒雞肉）每人約₩15,000至₩25,000。
大多數商店和餐廳接受刷卡；備少量現金應付小攤位及儲物櫃。

分層穿搭——島嶼和花園可能比首爾市中心涼爽
春夏備防曬用品；冬季備保暖外套及手套

首爾市中心飯店免費接送

seasonalVariations.title: Blossom season
seasonalVariations.description: 4月南怡島和晨靜樹木園的賞櫻及木蓮；本路線四季中最均衡的季節。

seasonalVariations.title: Lush but humid
seasonalVariations.description: 翠綠植被和較長日照，但6月下旬和7月預期潮濕及可能的梅雨。

seasonalVariations.title: Best photo season
seasonalVariations.description: 10月下旬至11月中旬南怡島落羽松和銀杏步道金黃火紅；攝影最強季節，同時也是最擁擠的季節。

seasonalVariations.title: Lighting Festival season
seasonalVariations.description: 12月至3月中旬：寧靜雪白的南怡島，加上晨靜樹木園著名的燈光節。寒冷但視覺效果極佳。

staticQuestions.question: 景點順序是什麼？為什麼不以小法國村開場？
staticQuestions.answer: 南怡島優先使用最強的早班渡船時段（08:30至10:00人潮最少，落羽松步道光線最佳）。晨靜樹木園在正午最方便午餐，園內步道也在此時段全面開放。小法國村是最輕鬆的景點，適合60分鐘的日落前收尾。可以應要求逆向安排，但通常會增加30至40分鐘等候時間。

staticQuestions.question: 入場費含在費用中還是另外支付？
staticQuestions.answer: 私人行程定價通常包含全部三個景點入場費：南怡島含來回渡船（成人₩19,000相當於）、晨靜樹木園（成人₩11,000）和小法國村（成人₩12,000）。預訂時請確認——部分運營商版本以較低頭條價格將入場費列為另計。午餐現場支付（每人約₩15,000至₩25,000）。

staticQuestions.question: 為什麼選擇私人行程而非巴士行程？
staticQuestions.answer: 私人行程比典型拼團巴士行程多出1至2小時有效遊覽時間，因為您略過了加平接駁巴士（每30至60分鐘一班）的等候時間，且可在最喜愛的景點延長停留。拼團行程遵循固定返回時間窗口。私人行程更適合多代同遊；巴士行程更適合獨自出行且以預算為優先的旅客。

staticQuestions.question: 南怡島渡船如何運作？
staticQuestions.answer: 渡船從加平碼頭每10至20分鐘一班，08:00至21:30運營。渡船橫渡時間5至10分鐘。來回票已包含在入場費中，並捆綁為「南怡共和國」的「簽證」品牌包裝。另有拉鏈滑翔繩選項（₩44,000單程；不含）供想跳過排隊又追求刺激的旅客選擇。

staticQuestions.question: 晨靜樹木園燈光節是什麼時候？
staticQuestions.answer: 通常12月初至3月中旬——韓國最大的花園燈光節將20個主題花園變為日落後的燈光步道。節日期間開放至21:00。若您的出發日期在此窗口內，值得留到日落後觀賞——請與運營商確認以延長行程並加入夜間換場。

staticQuestions.question: 可以用義大利村替換小法國村嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 可以——義大利村（木偶奇遇記和達文西主題公園）距小法國村約5分鐘，共享入場複合區（成人組合票₩18,000，比小法國村單票₩12,000稍貴）。只有同時參觀兩者才能節省費用。若只選擇義大利村需提前告知。義大利村的K-drama曝光度較低，但內部展示更豐富。

staticQuestions.question: 對於初次遊覽加平的旅客，這是好選擇嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 是的——在一天之內涵蓋了該地區最具代表性的景點，行程均衡豐富。

staticQuestions.question: 步行難度高嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 中等難度，南怡島步行量最多。南怡島面積較大，最具拍攝價值的落羽松步道和銀杏步道距渡船碼頭單程需15至20分鐘；可租借自行車和三輪車代步。晨靜樹木園以輕鬆鋪設步道為主，可選上坡至上層觀景台。小法國村是緊湊的山坡村落，有緩坡石階但無挑戰性步行。建議穿著包趾舒適步行鞋應對南怡島的非鋪設路段。

staticQuestions.question: 這個行程適合家庭嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 是的——首爾日行程中最親子友善的選擇之一。晨靜樹木園和小法國村適合嬰兒車通行；南怡島有非鋪設路段但可以步行。孩子最喜歡的景點包括小法國村的木偶劇場、南怡島兒童花園和南怡島的季節性動物互動。3歲以下用揹帶也可以。

staticQuestions.question: 年長者可以舒適地參加嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 是的——節奏和步行強度對活躍年長旅客相當友善。南怡島自行車租借可避免從碼頭步行15至20分鐘。晨靜樹木園有鋪設步道和各處設有座椅。小法國村緊湊，有緩坡石階。若需要全程輪椅無障礙則較不理想——南怡島步道和部分小法國村路段並非完全無障礙。

staticQuestions.question: 建議的最低參加年齡是多少？
staticQuestions.answer: 3歲以上均可——這是首爾日行程中最親子友善的選擇之一。晨靜樹木園和小法國村適合嬰兒車；南怡島非鋪設步道可以步行，非常幼小的孩子請用揹帶。孩子最喜歡的景點包括小法國村的木偶劇場和南怡島兒童花園。3歲以下用揹帶也歡迎。

meeting_points.name: 首爾市中心各飯店大廳
meeting_points.note: Door-to-door pickup at any hotel within the supported area.

dropoff_points.name: Any central Seoul hotel
dropoff_points.note: Drop-off at the same hotel or any address within the supported area.

pickup_dropoff.notes: 首爾市中心地區飯店免費接送（明洞、弘大、東大門、仁寺洞、梨泰院、江南）。請在約定出發時間前10分鐘在飯店大廳等候。接送通常08:30至09:30開始，返回19:00至19:30。

walking_notes: Nami Island is the largest walking section; the famous metasequoia path is 15 to 20 minutes one-way from the ferry pier.
Garden of Morning Calm is mostly easy with gentle slopes and optional viewpoint climbs.
Petite France is the easiest stop, with light slopes and stairs only.
Comfortable walking shoes are strongly recommended.
The route is not fully stroller-friendly because of unpaved island paths and garden steps.

seoul to nami island private driver

morning calm winter lights private tour
matching_profile.signature_window_label: Year-round (peak: April-May spring blooms, October-November autumn foliage, December-March Morning Calm Lighting Festival)

matching_metadata.note: Scores were tuned for a fixed three-stop private Gapyeong loop with strong scenic and photo fit, high comfort and family fit (private format), and moderate walking. Iconic landmark fit is maxed because all three stops are top-tier Korean tourism brand names. Same-day-flight fit is low because the loop runs 9-10 hours and ends in late afternoon or evening.

score_rationale.scenic_level: Maxed because all three stops are visually distinct and well-curated.
score_rationale.photo_level: Maxed because all three are heavy K-drama filming locations with seasonally rotating photo windows.
score_rationale.family_fit: Very high because private comfort plus child-friendly stops (rabbits at Nami, Marionettes at Petite France) make it broadly accessible.
score_rationale.rain_fit: Mid because most walking is outdoor; Petite France indoor halls help but do not cover the full route.
score_rationale.iconic_landmark_fit: Maxed because the three stops are the most-recognized day-trip combination from Seoul.

matching_metadata.patch_target: 13 substantive stops across 4 tours; Batches 8/9 era authoring → A-grade pv=6 PASS (universal source-attribution gap closed; Seoul-day-trip-quartet pattern introduced)

props.headlineLine1: Seoul Private Tour to Nami Island,

hero.tagline: From Nami Island's ferry crossing to the themed gardens of Morning Calm and the colorful village of Petite France—the classic Gapyeong loop in a fully private format.

galleryItems.alt: Avenue of tall metasequoia trees lining a straight path on Nami Island
galleryItems.caption: Nami Island metasequoia tree-lined road (Winter Sonata filming setting)
galleryItems.atmosphere: Tree-lined paths and Winter Sonata filming setting

galleryItems.alt: Themed garden landscape with manicured plant beds, paved paths, and a Korean peninsula-shaped pond
galleryItems.caption: Garden of Morning Calm (1996, 330,000 sqm, 20 themed gardens)
galleryItems.atmosphere: Themed gardens and seasonal festival displays

galleryItems.alt: Brightly painted French-style village buildings on a hillside above a lake
galleryItems.caption: Petite France — Le Petit Prince themed hillside village
galleryItems.atmosphere: Colorful Le Petit Prince village atmosphere

galleryItems.alt: Ferry approaching a wooded island across a wide lake
galleryItems.caption: Cheongpyeong Lake ferry approach to Nami Island

galleryItems.alt: Garden paths illuminated with thousands of LED lights at night, themed installations visible
galleryItems.caption: Garden of Morning Calm Winter Lighting Festival (December to mid-March)
galleryItems.atmosphere: Seasonal lights at the Garden of Morning Calm (Dec to mid-March)

itineraryStops.name: Nami Island (Namiseom)
itineraryStops.description: Nami Island opens the day with a short ferry crossing from Gapyeong Wharf onto a half-moon-shaped tree-lined island. Famous as the filming location of Winter Sonata, the island's metasequoia and ginkgo paths shift dramatically with the seasons—from cherry blossoms in spring to fiery foliage in autumn and snow-quiet paths in winter.
highlights: Half-moon-shaped island with the iconic metasequoia tree path
Winter Sonata and many other K-drama filming locations
Open year-round with strong seasonal mood changes
Easy walking, optional bicycle rental
timeUsed: Ferry crossing from Gapyeong Wharf (5 to 10 minutes)
Free time to walk, cycle, or eat at the on-island restaurants
Return ferry to the mainland
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Placing Nami Island first uses the strongest morning light for tree-lined photography and avoids the heaviest mid-afternoon ferry queues.

visitBasics.admission: Adult 16,000 KRW / Student & Senior (70+) 13,000 KRW / Child 10,000 KRW (includes round-trip ferry); zipwire 49,900 KRW one-way (includes admission)
visitBasics.walking: Easy — flat island with tree-lined paths; bike/electric vehicle rentals available

smartNotes.photo: Metasequoia Lane is the most iconic; ginkgo road in autumn (yellow); cherry blossoms in April; snow-covered paths in winter
smartNotes.facilities: Multiple cafés, restaurants, museum, gift shops; dakgalbi restaurants near the wharf
smartNotes.tip: Renting a bicycle (8,000 KRW/2hrs) covers more ground than walking; combine with Petite France & Garden of Morning Calm for full Gapyeong day

sources: KoreaToDo
TheTravelIntern
LifeOfDoing

itineraryStops.name: The Garden of Morning Calm
itineraryStops.description: Korea's oldest private garden, founded in 1996 and spanning 330,000 square meters with more than 5,000 plant species. Twenty themed gardens—including the Sunken Garden shaped like the Korean peninsula, the Cottage Garden, and the Pond Garden—feature in many beloved K-dramas including Moonlight Drawn by Clouds.
highlights: Korea's oldest private garden with 26 themed sections
Different visual identity in every season
Famous winter Lighting Festival from December to mid-March
K-drama filming location for many popular shows
timeUsed: Garden entry and orientation
Free walking time across the themed gardens
Optional cafe stop at Morning Spring Bakery
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Placing Morning Calm in the middle gives the day its calmest visual chapter, between the active island walk and the more compact village stop.

visitBasics.hours: Tue–Sun 09:00–22:00; Mon 09:00–19:00 (last admission 1 hour before close)
visitBasics.admission: Adult 11,000 KRW / Senior (65+) 9,000 KRW / Youth (13–18) 8,500 KRW / Child (3–12) 7,500 KRW
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — hill paths through 22 themed sections; mostly stroller-accessible main loop

smartNotes.photo: Korean Garden section in autumn; Hakyung Garden walking path; Lighting Festival evenings (Dec–Mar)
smartNotes.facilities: Café, gift shop selling garden-grown products, picnic areas
smartNotes.tip: Last admission 1 hour before close; Lighting Festival visits should start 1–2 hours before sunset to see both day and illuminated garden

sources: KoreaToDo
KoreaTravelEasy

itineraryStops.name: Petite France
itineraryStops.description: A compact themed village inspired by Antoine de Saint-Exupéry's Le Petit Prince, set on a hillside above Cheongpyeong Lake. Colorful French-style buildings host Marionette puppet shows, the Orgel House music-box collection, and exhibition halls. Famous as the filming location for K-dramas including My Love from Another Star, Beethoven Virus, and Running Man.
highlights: Colorful Le Petit Prince-themed European-style village
Marionette puppet shows and Orgel music-box performances
Photogenic hilltop setting overlooking Cheongpyeong Lake
Multiple K-drama filming spots
timeUsed: Entry and quick orientation
Walk through the colorful streets and photo points
Optional Marionette show or Orgel demonstration
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: Placed last, Petite France gives the day a lighter, photo-friendly close after the broader walks at Nami Island and Morning Calm.

visitBasics.admission: Adult 12,000 KRW / Teen 10,000 KRW / Child 8,000 KRW (combo with Italian Village ≈17,000 KRW)
visitBasics.walking: Easy — small flat village (1 hour to explore)

smartNotes.photo: Mini Eiffel Tower at entrance; colorful French-styled buildings; Little Prince statues throughout
smartNotes.facilities: Several cafés and restaurants; gift shops with Little Prince merchandise
smartNotes.tip: Smaller and more compact than Garden of Morning Calm — 30–60 min is typically enough; check performance schedule (marionette, organ) ahead

sources: KoreaToDo
LifeOfDoing

routeShapeIntro.title: How this private day moves
routeShapeIntro.subtitle: Pickup at your Seoul downtown hotel, then a single direction Gapyeong loop: Nami Island first for forest morning light, lunch in Gapyeong, then Morning Calm and Petite France in the afternoon. Return to Seoul around 19:00 to 19:30.

bestFor: Couples and honeymooners wanting a romantic K-drama day
First-time visitors to Korea who want one strong day-trip outside Seoul
Travelers who want a private vehicle without the bus-tour rhythm

routeLogicSections.title: Why this Gapyeong loop works in private format

items.label: No shuttle-bus waiting
items.detail: The standard Gapyeong shuttle bus runs only every 30 to 60 minutes between stops. Private transport eliminates that waiting and adds 1 to 2 hours back into your sightseeing day.

items.label: Better timing flexibility
items.detail: You can stay longer at the stop you love most—usually Nami Island or Morning Calm—instead of being locked to a fixed group return time.

items.label: Easier with parents and kids
items.detail: Door-to-door pickup means no early-morning subway transfers and no late-evening shuttle stress, which makes the route significantly easier for multi-generational groups.

routeLogicSections.title: How the walking load actually feels

items.label: Nami Island has the most cumulative walking
items.detail: The island is large and the most beautiful sections are 15 to 20 minutes from the ferry pier; bicycles are an option if walking is a concern.

items.label: Morning Calm is mostly easy with optional climbs
items.detail: Most paths are gentle, but the upper viewpoints reward a short climb.

items.label: Petite France is the easiest stop
items.detail: The village is small and mostly compact, with light slopes and stairs but no demanding walking.

items.label: Autumn is the strongest photo season
items.detail: Late October to mid-November turns Nami Island's metasequoia and ginkgo paths fiery and crowds peak; book early.

items.label: Winter brings the Lighting Festival
items.detail: From early December to mid-March, the Garden of Morning Calm hosts Korea's largest garden lighting festival—worth staying past sunset.

items.label: Spring and summer feel calmer
items.detail: April-May brings cherry blossoms and azaleas; July-August brings strong greenery but also higher humidity.

lessIdealFor: Solo budget travelers (private pricing is per vehicle)
Travelers wanting a high-action or sports-focused day
Visitors who dislike walking on uneven garden paths
Anyone needing a fully indoor rainy-day plan

practicalAccordionItems.title: Pickup & drop-off
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Free Seoul downtown hotel pickup; lobby meeting 10 minutes early
content: Free hotel pickup is included for Seoul downtown areas (Myeongdong, Hongdae, Dongdaemun, Insadong, Itaewon, Gangnam)
Stays outside Seoul downtown may incur an additional pickup fee
Please wait at the hotel lobby 10 minutes before the agreed departure time
Pickup typically starts between 08:30 and 09:30
Drop-off at your Seoul hotel between 19:00 and 19:30 (later if you stay for the winter Lighting Festival)
Itinerary details are usually confirmed 2-3 days before departure

practicalAccordionItems.title: Walking & terrain
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Moderate, with the most walking at Nami Island
content: Nami Island: easy unpaved paths, but the island is larger than it looks—15 to 20 minutes one-way to the famous metasequoia path
Garden of Morning Calm: easy to moderate, with gentle slopes and optional viewpoint climbs
Petite France: easy walking with light slopes and stairs
Comfortable walking shoes are recommended; the route is not stroller-impossible but not fully stroller-friendly either

practicalAccordionItems.title: Weather policy
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Most stops still operate in light rain or snow
content: Nami Island operates in rain and snow; the ferry runs unless safety is affected
Garden of Morning Calm is mostly outdoor; light rain is workable but heavy rain reduces enjoyment
Petite France has indoor exhibition halls that work as wet-weather shelter
The driver-guide can adjust pacing on the day if weather affects any specific stop

practicalAccordionItems.title: Admission and On-the-Day Spending
practicalAccordionItems.preview: All admission and meals pay directly; cards widely accepted
content: Nami Island admission with round-trip ferry: Adult 19,000 KRW
Garden of Morning Calm admission: Adult 11,000 KRW
Petite France admission: Adult 12,000 KRW
Meals (lunch and snacks) are paid directly; expect 15,000 to 25,000 KRW per person for a Dakgalbi meal near Nami Island
Most shops and restaurants accept credit cards; carry some cash for snack stalls and coin lockers

practicalAccordionItems.title: What to wear & bring
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Walking shoes, layers, and weather-appropriate outerwear
content: Comfortable walking shoes with good grip
Layered clothing—the island and garden can feel cooler than central Seoul
Sun protection in spring and summer; warm layers and gloves in winter
Camera or phone with plenty of storage for photos
Cash or card for admission and meals

practicalAccordionItems.title: What's included
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Vehicle and driver-guide; admission and meals pay direct
content: Private vehicle (sedan, SUV, or van based on group size)
Licensed English-speaking driver-guide
Free hotel pickup and drop-off in Seoul downtown
Fuel and tolls for the standard route
Admission fees to the three sites are not included; pay directly
Lunch and snacks are not included
Personal shopping is not included
Driver gratuities are not included

seasonalVariations.name: Spring
seasonalVariations.description: Cherry blossoms and magnolias bloom across Nami Island and Morning Calm in April; one of the most balanced seasons for the route.

seasonalVariations.name: Summer
seasonalVariations.description: Lush greenery and longer daylight, but expect humidity and possible monsoon rain in late June and July.

seasonalVariations.name: Autumn
seasonalVariations.description: Late October to mid-November turns Nami Island's metasequoia and ginkgo trees fiery; the strongest photo season but also the most crowded.

seasonalVariations.name: Winter
seasonalVariations.description: December to mid-March: snow-quiet Nami Island plus the famous Lighting Festival at the Garden of Morning Calm. Cold but visually rewarding.

bookingTrustItems.title: Licensed local operator
bookingTrustItems.description: Authorized Korean tour operator with full insurance

bookingTrustItems.title: Route specialists
bookingTrustItems.description: Hand-tuned itinerary, not a generic loop

bookingSupportSteps.title: 12-Hour Reminder
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Weather update and any route adjustments

bookingSupportSteps.title: Final Pickup Info
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Exact pickup time and driver contact

bookingSupportSteps.title: Day-of Route Notes
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Morning briefing based on live conditions

staticQuestions.question: What's the order of stops, and why not Petite France first?
staticQuestions.answer: Nami Island first uses the strongest morning ferry slot (08:30-10:00 has the lowest queues and the best metasequoia-path light). The Garden of Morning Calm sits at midday because most paths there are open and the on-site lunch is convenient. Petite France is the lightest stop and works as a 60-minute sunset close. Reverse order is possible by request but typically adds 30-40 minutes of waiting time.

staticQuestions.question: Are admissions included or paid separately?
staticQuestions.answer: Private-tour pricing typically includes all three admissions: Nami Island with round-trip ferry (19,000 KRW adult equivalent), Garden of Morning Calm (11,000 KRW adult), and Petite France (12,000 KRW adult). Confirm at booking — some operator versions list admissions as excluded for a lower headline price. Lunch is paid direct at the restaurant (≈ 15,000-25,000 KRW per person).

staticQuestions.question: Why pick the private tour over a bus tour?
staticQuestions.answer: Private gives you 1-2 extra hours over a typical group bus tour because you skip the shuttle-bus wait between stops (the public Gapyeong shuttle runs only every 30-60 minutes), and you can stay longer at whichever stop you love most. Group bus tours stick to fixed return windows. Private fits multi-generational groups better; bus tours fit solo budget travelers better.

staticQuestions.question: How does the Nami Island ferry work?
staticQuestions.answer: The ferry runs every 10-20 minutes from Gapyeong Wharf, 08:00 to 21:30. The crossing takes 5-10 minutes. Round-trip ticket is included in admission and bundled with the Nami Republic 'visa' branding. There is also a faster zip-wire option (44,000 KRW one-way; not included) for travelers who want to skip the queue with a thrill.

staticQuestions.question: When is the Garden of Morning Calm Lighting Festival?
staticQuestions.answer: Early December to mid-March, typically — Korea's largest garden lighting festival turns the 20 themed gardens into illuminated walks after dark. Hours extend until 21:00 during the festival. Worth staying past sunset if your tour date falls in this window — confirm with the operator to extend the schedule and add an evening transfer.

staticQuestions.question: Can we substitute Italian Village for Petite France?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — Italian Village (a Pinocchio and Da Vinci themed park) sits about 5 minutes from Petite France and shares an admissions complex (combo ticket: Adult 18,000 KRW for both vs 12,000 for Petite France alone). The combo only saves money if visiting both. Switching solo to Italian Village instead requires advance notice. Italian Village is less K-drama-photographed but has stronger interior exhibits.

staticQuestions.question: Is this a good choice for first-time visitors to Gapyeong (Seoul Day Trip)?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — it covers the most distinctive stops in the area in a single balanced day.

staticQuestions.question: Is the walking difficult?
staticQuestions.answer: Moderate walking with some active sections. Nami Island has the most cumulative walking — the most photogenic metasequoia and ginkgo paths are 15-20 minutes from the ferry pier; bicycle and pedicab rentals are available. The Garden of Morning Calm is mostly easy paved paths with optional climbs to upper viewpoints. Petite France is a compact hillside village with light steps. Closed-toe shoes recommended for Nami's unpaved sections.

staticQuestions.question: Is this tour suitable for families?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — one of the most family-friendly Seoul day-trips. Strollers work at Morning Calm and Petite France; Nami Island has unpaved sections but they're walkable. Kid-focused spots include the Petite France marionette show, the Nami Island children's garden, and the seasonal animal interactions on Nami. Under-3s also OK with carriers.

staticQuestions.question: Can older adults join comfortably?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — pacing and walking are comfortable for active seniors. Bicycle rental on Nami avoids the 15-20 minute walk from the pier. Garden of Morning Calm has paved paths and benches throughout. Petite France is compact with light steps. Less ideal if wheelchair access is required throughout — Nami's island paths and some Petite France sections are not fully accessible.

staticQuestions.question: What's the recommended minimum age?
staticQuestions.answer: Age 3+ is fine — this is one of the most family-friendly Seoul day-trips. Strollers work at Morning Calm and Petite France; Nami's unpaved paths are walkable but bring a carrier for very young children. Kid-favorite spots include the Petite France marionette show and the Nami Island children's garden. Under-3s also welcome with carriers.

props.note: checkout_tour_id resolves at runtime from Supabase / env; not part of static JSONB.

fix_passes.v12: P0+P1 — pickup_dropoff Schema A unification, routeFlowStops type-based, competing_products → internal slugs, anchor_poi_keys aligned
fix_passes.v13: P1.5 — pickup_dropoff Schema A.2 → A.1; practicalAccordionItems / routePhases / seasonalVariations unified to V4 canonical (no Tailwind in data)
fix_passes.v14: P2 — _publication uniform; duration formatting standardized; glanceItems Duration added where missing
fix_passes.v15: P3 round 1 — SEO trim. seo.pageTitle rewritten to ≤65 chars (was 14/25 over 70); seo.metaDescription rewritten to ≤168 chars (was 25/25 over 170). primaryKeywords and ogImage unchanged. Hero/OG images, POI verification, review imports, and routePhases enrichment deferred to later P3 rounds.

v17_schema_unification.description: Phase 1: Converted matching_profile scores from 1-5 int scale to 0-1 float scale to match the 3 Step 3 new tours. Mapping 1→0.20, 2→0.40, 3→0.60, 4→0.80, 5→1.00. Mechanical conversion preserves ordinal information; verified-fact recalibration happens in subsequent enhancement batches.

v17_batch8_enhancement.description: Batch 8 deep enhancement — Seoul DMZ + Nami/Morning Calm/Petite France pair. Returns to single-POI fixed-itinerary methodology (batches 1-5 style) after Batch 7's route-option charter format. All stops enhanced with 1,000+ char descriptions weaving verified facts. matching_profile recalibrated to verified-fact 0-1 float scores. Charter-format dimensions previously null: private_tour_fit set to 1.0; customizable_route_fit set to 0.4 (fixed itinerary); flexibility_fit set to 0.6-0.7 (driver-guide pacing flex but not destination flex). Tour-specific: history_culture_fit DMZ 1.0 (catalog-heaviest history) / Nami 0.6 (K-drama + culture). Nami romantic_fit set to 0.95 (catalog-leading). 5 new POIs added to KB (v1.10 → v1.11): nami_island, imjingak_peace_park, third_infiltration_tunnel, dora_observatory, gamaksan_red_bridge. Garden of Morning Calm and Petite France reused from KB v1.10 (Batch 7) unchanged.

_score_audit._methodology: 0-1 float scale per Phase 1 standard. Both tours are 8-9hr private FIXED-itinerary tours (NOT route-option charters like Batch 7). private_tour_fit set to 1.0 by definition (was None). customizable_route_fit = 0.4 (driver-guide can adjust pacing/lunch but not destinations). flexibility_fit = 0.6 (private vehicle door-to-door but the route stops are fixed). history_culture_fit set as DMZ tour 1.0 (heaviest history content in catalog) / Nami tour 0.6 (K-drama + general culture but not history-deep). Time-weighted indoor_ratio re-computed per Fix 1 methodology using verified per-POI indoor_ratio_at_stop values.

private_tour_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — both tours are per-vehicle private tours by definition. Was previously None (unset).

small_group_fit.reasoning: Verified — these are PRIVATE tours not small-group. 0.15 reflects that a 1-vehicle booking still functions as a small private group.

history_culture_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Nami's General Nami history (1441-1468 Joseon-era treason execution) and Petite France's Saint-Exupéry / Little Prince narrative + multi-K-drama filming legacy provide moderate culture content. Was None. 0.60 reflects K-drama-pop-culture-heavy weight.

customizable_route_fit.reasoning: Verified — fixed itinerary; driver-guide adjusts pacing/lunch but not the 3 destinations. 0.4 fixed-itinerary private tours.

flexibility_fit.reasoning: Verified — private vehicle door-to-door, no military restrictions; driver-guide can fully flex pacing, lunch, photo stops, and ferry-queue avoidance. 0.7 calibrated.

romantic_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Winter Sonata legacy + Metasequoia avenue + Morning Calm Lighting Festival + Petite France pastel-romance theme = catalog's strongest romantic-fit tour. 0.95.

unesco_fit.reasoning: Verified — no UNESCO sites on this route. 0.15 reflects baseline.

iconic_landmark_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Nami's Metasequoia avenue is iconic globally; Morning Calm Lighting Festival is iconic in season; Petite France is photographically iconic. Slight markdown to 0.90 reflects that 'iconic' is K-drama-pop-culture-iconic rather than UNESCO/historic-iconic.

first_time_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — strongest first-time Gapyeong day-trip. Slight markdown to 0.95 reflects that first-time visitors with limited time may prefer DMZ for the heavier story or Everland for kids. 0.95 calibrated.

walking_level.reasoning: VERIFIED — Nami island walks 5 km flat tree-lined paths; Morning Calm 1.5-2hr garden paths over rolling terrain; Petite France compact. Average 0.50, slightly lower than previous 0.60.

indoor_ratio.reasoning: VERIFIED — Fix 1 time-weighted: Nami 180 min × 0.10 = 18, Morning Calm 120 min × 0.10 = 12, Petite France 60 min × 0.40 = 24, Lunch 60 min × 0.90 = 54, transit 180 min × 1.0 = 180. Total indoor 288 / 600 min = 0.48 with full transit; substantive only 54 / 360 = 0.15. Catalog value 0.20 (slight upward adjustment from 0.15 for lunch + Petite France interior weight). Was previously 0.15.

weather_sensitivity.reasoning: Verified maintained — Nami outdoor walks + Morning Calm garden + Petite France hill village are all weather-exposed. Indoor fallbacks limited (Petite France interiors only ~30 min). 0.60 maintained.

scenic_level.reasoning: Verified — catalog-leading scenic content (river-island tree-lined avenues + 330,000 m² arboretum + pastel village). Slight markdown to 0.95 saving 1.0 for tours that include flagship UNESCO scenic sites.

photo_level.reasoning: Verified maintained — strongest photographic-return tour in the catalog. Maintained at 1.0.

family_fit.reasoning: Verified maintained — outdoor walks + colorful village + light scenery are best-in-class for families with kids 4-12. Maintained at 1.0.

storytelling_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — driver-guide narrative is rich (General Nami history, Winter Sonata legacy, Saint-Exupéry, multi-K-drama filming). Calibrated up to 0.85.

value_for_money_fit.reasoning: Verified maintained — per-vehicle pricing good value for groups of 3-9, premium per-person for solo/pair. 0.60 maintained.

premium_fit.reasoning: Verified maintained — private vehicle + flexible pacing + driver-guide + scenic premium destinations. Maintained at 1.0.
